en: Then Solomon began to build the house of the LORD in Jerusalem on Mount Moriah, where the LORD had appeared to David his father, at the place that David had appointed, on the threshing floor of Ornan the Jebusite.
zh: 所羅門在耶路撒冷，在耶和華向他父親大衛顯現過的摩利亞山上，就是在耶布斯人阿珥楠的禾場上，大衛預備的地方，開工建造耶和華的殿。

en: He began to build in the second month of the fourth year of his reign.
zh: 所羅門執政後第四年二月初二開始建造。

en: These are Solomon's measurements for building the house of God: the length, in cubits of the old standard, was sixty cubits, and the breadth twenty cubits.
zh: 所羅門建造 神殿宇的根基是這樣：按古時的尺寸，長二十七公尺，寬九公尺。

en: The vestibule in front of the nave of the house was twenty cubits long, equal to the width of the house, and its height was 120 cubits. He overlaid it on the inside with pure gold.
zh: 殿前走廊長九公尺，與殿的寬度相等；高九公尺 ；裡面貼上純金。

en: The nave he lined with cypress and covered it with fine gold and made palms and chains on it.
zh: 大殿的牆都蓋上松木，又貼上精金，又在上面刻上棕樹和鍊子。

en: He adorned the house with settings of precious stones. The gold was gold of Parvaim.
zh: 又用寶石裝飾殿牆，十分華美；金子都是巴瓦音的金子。

en: So he lined the house with gold- its beams, its thresholds, its walls, and its doors- and he carved cherubim on the walls.
zh: 正殿和殿的棟梁、門檻、牆壁和門扇，都貼上金子；牆上刻上基路伯。

en: And he made the Most Holy Place. Its length, corresponding to the breadth of the house, was twenty cubits, and its breadth was twenty cubits. He overlaid it with 600 talents of fine gold.
zh: 他又建造了至聖所，長九公尺，和殿的寬度相等，寬度也是九公尺；裡面都貼上精金，共用了二十公噸金子。

en: The weight of gold for the nails was fifty shekels. And he overlaid the upper chambers with gold.
zh: 釘子共重五百七十克金子。閣樓也貼上金子。

en: In the Most Holy Place he made two cherubim of wood and overlaid them with gold.
zh: 在至聖所裡，雕刻了兩個基路伯，都包上金子。

en: The wings of the cherubim together extended twenty cubits: one wing of the one, of five cubits, touched the wall of the house, and its other wing, of five cubits, touched the wing of the other cherub;
zh: 兩個基路伯的翅膀共長九公尺；一個基路伯的一邊翅膀長兩公尺兩公寸，觸著殿牆；另一邊翅膀也長兩公尺兩公寸，和另一個基路伯的翅膀相接。

en: and of this cherub, one wing, of five cubits, touched the wall of the house, and the other wing, also of five cubits, was joined to the wing of the first cherub.
zh: 另一個基路伯的一邊翅膀也長兩公尺兩公寸，觸著殿牆；另一邊的翅膀也長兩公尺兩公寸，和前一個基路伯的翅膀相接。

en: The wings of these cherubim extended twenty cubits. The cherubim stood on their feet, facing the nave.
zh: 這兩個基路伯的翅膀都張開，共長九公尺；這兩個基路伯都面向殿內站立。

en: And he made the veil of blue and purple and crimson fabrics and fine linen, and he worked cherubim on it.
zh: 所羅門又用藍色紫色朱紅色線和細麻做幔子，上面繡上基路伯。

en: In front of the house he made two pillars thirty-five cubits high, with a capital of five cubits on the top of each.
zh: 在殿的前面又做了兩根柱子，高十五公尺半，每根柱上面的柱頂，高兩公尺兩公寸。

en: He made chains like a necklace and put them on the tops of the pillars, and he made a hundred pomegranates and put them on the chains.
zh: 又做了像項鍊 的鍊子，安放在柱頭上；又做了石榴一百個，安放在鍊子上。

en: He set up the pillars in front of the temple, one on the south, the other on the north; that on the south he called Jachin, and that on the north Boaz.
zh: 他把這兩根柱子立在殿前，一根在左面，一根在右面；右面的叫雅斤，左面的叫波阿斯。
